stemHtml: The pilot of a light sports aircraft is taxying out for departure from a large aerodrome. While holding at holding point SIERRA 1 to cross runway 26, she receives instructions to cross the runway behind a landing Airbus A319. What is the correct reply from the pilot to this conditional clearance?

options.a: “BEHIND LANDING A319, FROM SIERRA 1, CROSS RWY 26 BEHIND”
options.c: “BEHIND LANDING A319, FROM SIERRA 1, CROSS RWY 26”
options.d: “FROM SIERRA 1, CROSS RWY 26 BEHIND LANDING A319”
